thinks.think: A black screen transitions to a dark wood background. White text than Kitc appears obscured by golden effects. Below, yellow text reads ANG'S. Graphics emerge tearing through the wood surface, surrounded by glowing sparkles and debris.

The fragmented graphics and golden sparkles smoothly coalesce into a clear rectangular image displaying food dishes with black text "Minang's Kitchen" superimposed. Below, the yellow capital text completes to fully read "MINANG'S KITCHEN" against the dark wood grain background. Finally, the entire visual completely fades away, returning the screen to total blackness.

From black, a close-up of yellow rice mixed with peppers and egg slices appears. White text "Bringhe" overlays the top left. Bottom text requests likes and subscriptions. A red "SUBSCRIBE" button sits in the corner, then transforms into a white "SUBSCRIBED" button as a cursor clicks a notification bell icon.

The food close-up fades to black, keeping the bottom text and subscription graphic. Then, raw chicken and rice appear. A white text list titled "INGREDIENTS" overlays the image, detailing quantities for chicken, rice, coconut milk, chorizo, and vegetables. A "SUBSCRIBED" button stays in the bottom right corner.

The ingredient list overlay persists over the food items. The camera view shifts slightly right, revealing more raw chicken cuts, a whole red onion, and a garlic bulb on the frame's right side. The white text list and the "SUBSCRIBED" button remain fixed in position.

The previous ingredient list overlay and raw chicken scene cuts to a new shot featuring a white bowl filled with uncooked white rice on a wooden surface. A stream of clear water pours directly into the center of the grains. White text at the bottom reads "Soak malagkit rice for" while a small channel logo appears in the top left corner.

Water pours into a white bowl filled with uncooked rice grains on a wooden table. The liquid level rises, submerging the grains completely. Bottom text updates to instructions: "Soak malagkit rice for 10 to 15 minutes; then drain well". Bubbles appear on the water surface as the bowl fills.

A blue spatula with a grey handle enters the white bowl containing water and rice. The utensil stirs the submerged grains, mixing them within the liquid. The instructional text regarding soaking time remains fixed at the bottom of the screen while the channel logo stays in the top left corner.

The blue spatula stirs the submerged rice grains within the white bowl filled with cloudy water. Afterward, the utensil is removed from the frame, leaving the rice soaking undisturbed in the liquid. The instructional text regarding soaking time remains fixed at the bottom of the screen throughout the sequence.

The view transitions from the bowl of rice to a stainless steel gas stovetop with black grates. A large, silver metal wok is placed onto the front burner. White text at the bottom updates to instructions: "Set wok on medium-low flame" as the cookware is positioned.

The camera zooms in on the silver wok sitting on the stovetop grate. White text at the bottom reads "Set wok on medium-low flame". A ring of blue fire ignites beneath the metal pan, illuminating the burner area as the heat turns on.

A hand holding a bottle pours a stream of clear cooking oil into the center of the heated silver wok. The blue gas flame remains visible beneath the pan. The white text overlay at the bottom updates to read "Add cooking oil" as the liquid begins to coat the metal surface.

A hand pours clear cooking oil from a bottle into the heated silver wok. The liquid spreads across the bottom surface of the pan while the blue gas flame burns underneath. The text "Add cooking oil" remains displayed at the bottom of the screen.

Sliced red sausage pieces are added to the hot oil in the silver wok. The text overlay updates to read "Pan fry chorizo for 1 to 2 minutes" along with a note to "Use Chorizo de Bilboa if available." The red meat slices sit in the center of the pan.

A wooden spatula enters the frame from the top right, hovering over the red sausage slices frying in the hot oil inside the silver wok. The white instructional text regarding pan-frying the chorizo remains fixed at the bottom of the screen while the meat cooks.

A brown wooden spatula presses down on the sliced red sausages frying in the silver wok. The utensil pushes the meat pieces around in the hot oil while the white instructional text about pan-frying chorizo remains fixed at the bottom of the screen.

A brown wooden spatula presses down on red sausage slices frying in hot oil within a silver wok. The meat appears glossy as the utensil moves the pieces around the pan surface. White text instructions about pan-frying chorizo remain visible at the bottom of the frame.

A brown wooden spatula continues to press and move sliced red sausages frying in hot oil within a silver wok. The meat pieces glisten as they are shifted around the pan surface. White instructional text regarding pan-frying chorizo remains visible at the bottom of the frame.

Silver metal tongs replace the wooden spatula, gripping the glossy red sausage slices frying in the silver wok. The bottom text updates to "Set" as the tongs begin to lift the cooked meat pieces from the hot oil. The sausages appear browned and glistening with oil.

Silver metal tongs lift the fried red sausage slices from the hot oil in the wok. The utensil transfers the cooked meat pieces onto a white ceramic plate held by a hand on the right side. The instructional text "Set aside" appears at the bottom left corner of the screen.

A white plate held by a hand displays the cooked red sausage slices. The glossy meat pieces rest on the plate surface. The text 'Set aside' is visible at the bottom left. The camera focuses on the removed ingredient held above the counter, showing the browned texture of the meat.

Sliced green bell peppers are now frying in the silver wok with hot oil. White text at the bottom reads "Sear green bell pepper for 30 seconds; then set aside". Silver metal tongs enter the frame to stir the bright green vegetable strips in the pan.

Silver metal tongs stir sliced green bell peppers frying in hot oil within a silver wok. The vegetables glisten as they are moved around the pan surface. White instructional text at the bottom reads "Sear green bell pepper for 30 seconds; then set aside" throughout the clip.

Silver tongs transfer seared green bell pepper strips from the hot oil in the silver wok onto a white ceramic plate held nearby. The instructional text "Sear green bell pepper for 30 seconds; then set aside" remains displayed at the bottom of the screen throughout the action.

Sliced red bell peppers are added to the hot oil in the silver wok. The on-screen text changes to "Do the same for the red bell peppers". The red strips are scattered in the pan, frying in the oil left from the previous ingredients.

Silver metal tongs stir sliced red bell peppers frying in hot oil within a silver wok. The vegetables glisten as they are moved around the pan surface. White instructional text at the bottom reads "Do the same for the red bell peppers" throughout the clip.

Silver metal tongs transfer the seared red bell pepper strips from the hot oil in the silver wok onto a white ceramic plate held nearby. The instructional text "Do the same for the red bell peppers" remains displayed at the bottom of the screen throughout the action.

Seared red bell peppers rest on a white plate. A hand pours chopped white garlic from a small metal bowl into the hot oil in the silver wok. The scenes overlap visually in a transition effect. The oil bubbles as the garlic pieces hit the surface.

Chopped white garlic pieces sizzle in bubbling hot oil within the silver wok. A brown wooden spatula enters from the top right to stir the garlic. White text at the bottom reads "On the same wok, saute chopped garlic" as the ingredients are mixed together in the center of the pan.

Chopped red onions, characterized by purple and white chunks, are poured into the silver wok mixing with the sautéing garlic and oil. The wooden spatula rests nearby. The on-screen text changes to "Chopped red onions" to label the ingredient being added to the pan.

A brown wooden spatula stirs the mixture of chopped red onions and garlic frying in hot oil within the silver wok. The purple and white onion chunks are blended with the garlic pieces. White text at the bottom reads "Chopped red onions" as the ingredients sauté together in the pan.

A hand holds a small metal bowl containing bright orange grated material over the silver wok. The orange substance is poured into the pan, landing on top of the sautéing onions and garlic. The white text overlay at the bottom updates to read "Grated" as the ingredient is added to the mixture.

Bright orange grated turmeric is poured from a small metal bowl into the silver wok, landing atop the sautéing onions and garlic. The on-screen text updates to read "Grated turmeric" as the vibrant spice joins the mixture in the hot oil.

A brown wooden spatula mixes the bright orange grated turmeric into the sautéing chopped onions and garlic within the silver wok. The vibrant spice is stirred thoroughly, blending its color with the white and purple onion pieces frying in the hot oil.

A wooden spatula mixes the bright orange grated turmeric with the sautéing chopped onions and garlic in the silver wok. The ingredients blend together in the hot oil, coating the aromatics with the vibrant spice color while the text "Grated turmeric" stays visible.

Raw chicken cuts are added to the silver wok, landing on top of the sautéed turmeric, onion, and garlic mixture. The text overlay changes to read "Add chicken cuts" at the bottom. The pale pink meat contrasts with the vibrant yellow-orange aromatics as it is introduced to the pan.

A brown wooden spatula stirs the raw pink chicken pieces, mixing them with the yellow turmeric, onion, and garlic base in the silver wok. The caption changes to 'Saute for 2 to 3 minutes then cover' as the ingredients are combined.

A brown wooden spatula stirs raw chicken pieces in the silver wok, coating them with the yellow turmeric and onion mixture. The pale meat is turned over to mix with the aromatics, while the instruction 'Saute for 2 to 3 minutes then cover' remains visible at the bottom of the screen.

The brown wooden spatula turns the raw chicken pieces over in the silver wok, mixing them thoroughly with the yellow turmeric and onion base. The caption 'Saute for 2 to 3 minutes then cover' remains at the bottom as the pale meat becomes coated in the vibrant spice mixture.

A shiny silver metal lid reflecting light is placed over the wok by a hand, covering the sautéing chicken and yellow spice mixture. The instructional text "Saute for 2 to 3 minutes then cover" remains visible at the bottom as the cooking vessel is sealed.

A shiny silver metal lid reflecting light is placed over the wok by a hand, completely covering the sautéing chicken and yellow spice mixture inside. The instructional text "Saute for 2 to 3 minutes then cover" remains visible at the bottom of the screen as the cooking vessel is sealed.

The silver lid is removed, revealing chicken pieces simmering in yellow oil and spices. The meat appears pale and partially cooked. New white text appears at the bottom reading "Cook for 3 to 5 minutes or until chicken renders its own oil". The mixture bubbles gently in the wok.

Chicken pieces simmer in yellow oil within the silver wok while the text "Cook for 3 to 5 minutes or until chicken renders its own oil" displays. The meat appears pale and partially cooked as the mixture bubbles gently in the pan.

White coconut milk is poured from a metal bowl into the wok containing the yellow rice and chicken mixture. The text "Add coconut milk" is displayed at the bottom of the screen. The thick liquid flows over the seasoned grains, pooling around the ingredients and beginning to submerge them.

White coconut milk pours into the silver wok, surrounding the yellow rice and chicken. A single dried brown bay leaf is placed on top of the mixture. The caption at the bottom changes from 'Add coconut milk' to 'Bay leaves' as the liquid settles around the ingredients.

A brown wooden spatula stirs the yellow rice and chicken mixture, blending it with the white coconut milk inside the silver wok. The ingredients are combined as the liquid incorporates into the grains. The on-screen text updates to read "Give it a mix" at the bottom left corner.

A brown wooden spatula stirs the yellow rice and chicken mixture inside the silver wok, blending the white coconut milk into the grains. The ingredients combine into a creamy, cohesive mass as the utensil moves through the pan. The text "Give it a mix" stays visible at the bottom left corner.

The yellow rice and chicken mixture simmers in the silver wok, with creamy liquid bubbling around the grains. White text at the bottom reads "Simmer for 3 to 5 minutes". The wooden spatula is absent as the dish cooks uncovered in the pan.

A shiny silver lid is placed over the wok containing the simmering yellow rice and chicken mixture. The on-screen text updates to read "Simmer for 3 to 5 minutes, covered" as the vessel is sealed. Reflections are visible on the curved metal surface of the lid.

The shiny silver lid is removed from the wok, revealing the cooked yellow rice and chicken mixture. The liquid has been absorbed, leaving the grains moist and fluffy. A brown wooden spatula stirs the dish, mixing the cooked chicken pieces with the seasoned rice. The text "Stir" appears at the bottom.

A wooden spatula stirs the yellow rice and chicken mixture in the silver wok. Then, a white liquid is poured from a container into the pan, flowing over the cooked grains. The text overlay changes to "Add coconut milk" indicating the new ingredient being added to the dish.

White coconut milk is poured from a container into the silver wok, flowing over the yellow rice and chicken mixture. The liquid pools around the ingredients, creating a creamy base. The caption "Add coconut milk" appears at the bottom as the liquid fills the pan.

White coconut milk is poured into the silver wok, flowing over the yellow rice and chicken mixture. The liquid pools around the ingredients, creating a creamy base. The caption "Add coconut milk" appears at the bottom as the liquid fills the pan.

White coconut milk pools around the yellow rice and chicken mixture in the silver wok. A white bowl containing bright orange sliced carrots is held over the pan, ready to be added. The text "Sliced" appears in the bottom left corner as the vegetables are introduced.

Sliced orange carrots are poured from a white bowl into the silver wok, landing in the white coconut milk mixture with yellow rice and chicken. The on-screen text updates to "Sliced carrots" as the vegetables settle. A like and dislike graphic appears in the upper right corner.

Dark red slices of pan-fried chorizo are added to the silver wok, resting on the white coconut milk and yellow rice mixture. The bottom text updates to "Pan fried chorizo," and a "Minang's Kitchen" subscribe banner appears in the upper right corner.

Green bell pepper strips are added to the silver wok, landing on the rice, coconut milk, carrots, and chorizo. The caption at the bottom updates to "Half of the seared green and red bell peppers" as the vegetables join the simmering dish.

Red bell pepper strips are added to the wok. Then, green peas are poured from a white bowl into the creamy rice mixture. The text overlay updates to "Add green peas" as the legumes scatter across the dish containing carrots and chorizo.

A white bowl filled with dark raisins is held above the silver wok. The raisins are poured onto the creamy yellow rice mixture containing carrots, chorizo, and green peas. The caption 'Raisins' is displayed in the bottom left corner as the dried fruit falls into the pan.

Dark raisins are poured from a white bowl onto the creamy rice mixture containing carrots, chorizo, and green peas. The text "Raisins" is displayed at the bottom left. Subsequently, a small white spoon holding brown liquid appears in the upper right corner as the caption updates to "Season with fish sauce".

A small white spoon pours a stream of brown liquid into the silver wok, accompanied by the text 'Season with fish sauce'. The liquid cascades over the existing mixture of yellow rice, white coconut milk, green peas, orange carrots, dark raisins, and red chorizo slices.

After the brown liquid is poured, a white spoon containing white powder appears above the pan. The powder is sprinkled over the rice, vegetables, and raisins mixture. The on-screen text updates from 'Season with fish sauce' to 'Chicken powder' indicating the new ingredient being added to the creamy dish in the silver wok.

White powder is sprinkled from a spoon onto the creamy rice mixture containing peas, carrots, and raisins. The text "Chicken powder" appears in the bottom left corner. The granular seasoning lands on top of the colorful ingredients in the silver pan, dusting the vegetables and meat.

Dark ground black pepper is sprinkled over the creamy rice and vegetable mixture in the silver wok. The caption at the bottom changes to "Ground black pepper" to indicate the new seasoning. A small white spoon holding the spice is visible in the upper right corner as the dark specks land on the ingredients.

The seasoned mixture sits in the pan with visible black pepper. The text overlay at the bottom left updates to "Mix". The colorful ingredients like carrots and peas rest in the white coconut milk without being stirred yet.

A brown wooden spatula enters the silver wok from the upper right corner. It begins to stir the colorful mixture of yellow rice, chicken, vegetables, and white coconut milk. The on-screen text updates to "Mix it well" as the utensil starts folding the ingredients together within the pan.

A wooden spatula stirs the mixture of yellow rice, chicken, green peas, orange carrots, and dark raisins in the silver wok. The white liquid blends with the ingredients as the utensil folds them together. The text "Mix it well" appears at the bottom left corner of the screen during this action.

A wooden spatula stirs the mixture of yellow rice, chicken, green peas, carrots, and raisins in the silver wok. The white liquid blends with the ingredients as the utensil folds them together. The text "Mix it well" appears at the bottom left corner of the screen during this action.

The wooden spatula lifts and turns the yellow rice mixture, incorporating the white liquid further. Chicken pieces, green peas, carrots, and raisins are tossed together in the silver wok. The caption "Mix it well" stays on screen as the stirring continues to blend the ingredients thoroughly.

A wooden spatula continues to stir the yellow rice mixture in the silver wok, blending the white liquid with the chicken, peas, carrots, and raisins. The ingredients are folded together thoroughly as the text "Mix it well" remains visible at the bottom left.

A wooden spatula continues to stir the yellow rice mixture containing chicken, peas, carrots, and raisins in a silver wok. The creamy white liquid blends further with the ingredients as the utensil folds them together. The text "Mix it well" remains visible at the bottom left corner.

A wooden spatula lifts and folds the creamy yellow rice mixture containing chicken, carrots, peas, and raisins within the silver wok. The white liquid continues to integrate with the solid ingredients as the utensil moves through the pan. The instruction "Mix it well" remains displayed at the bottom left.

A wooden spatula stirs the creamy yellow rice mixture containing chicken, peas, carrots, and raisins in a silver wok. The white liquid integrates with the solid ingredients as the utensil folds them together. The text "Mix it well" remains at the bottom left.

A hand sprinkles white salt over the yellow rice mixture containing chicken, peas, carrots, and raisins in a silver wok. The text "Add salt" appears at the bottom left. The creamy mixture sits in the pan as the seasoning is added.

The yellow rice mixture with chicken, peas, carrots, and raisins sits in the silver wok. The text "Add salt" is displayed at the bottom left. The creamy dish fills the pan, showing the added seasoning resting on the surface before further mixing.

A wooden spatula stirs the creamy yellow rice mixture containing chicken, peas, and carrots inside the silver wok. The utensil folds the ingredients together as the white instructional text "Add salt" remains fixed at the bottom left corner of the screen throughout the action.

A wooden spatula stirs the creamy yellow rice mixture containing chicken, peas, carrots, and raisins inside the silver wok. The utensil folds the ingredients together. The white instructional text 'Add salt' remains fixed at the bottom left corner of the screen throughout the mixing action.

A hand places a large, shiny silver lid over the wok containing the yellow rice mixture. The text at the bottom changes to "Cover and lower the flame to low" as the lid fully covers the food inside the pan, reflecting light.

The camera angle changes to show the gas burner beneath the covered silver wok. A ring of blue flame is visible burning under the pan. The white text at the bottom reads 'Cover and lower the flame to low' as the fire continues to heat the cookware from below.

The view switches from the blue flame under the pan to the simmering yellow rice mixture inside the wok. The creamy dish bubbles gently. White text appears at the bottom reading "Simmer for 5 to 8 minutes or until coconut cream is almost absorbed by the rice".

The yellow rice mixture continues to simmer in the silver wok, with bubbles breaking the surface of the creamy sauce. The liquid level appears slightly reduced as it cooks. White text at the bottom instructs to "Simmer for 5 to 8 minutes or until coconut cream is almost absorbed by the rice".
The scene cuts to a silver pan. Hands place a large, bright green banana leaf inside to line the bottom. On-screen text instructs to get another pan and cover the bottom with layers of banana leaves.

Hands arrange a large green banana leaf inside a silver pan, pressing it flat against the bottom. The on-screen text instructs to "Get another pan and cover the bottom of the pan with layers of banana leaves" while the hands smooth the leaf surface.

Hands press the large green banana leaf flat against the silver pan bottom. A wooden spatula enters holding a mound of creamy yellow rice mixture containing visible carrots and raisins. The white text at the bottom updates to instruct transferring the cooked rice mixture into the prepared pan.

A wooden spatula transfers a portion of yellow rice mixture with carrots and raisins onto the green banana leaf inside a silver pan. The text "Transfer the cooked rice mixture in the prepared pan" is displayed at the bottom while the spatula releases the food onto the leaf lining.

A wooden spatula deposits a large portion of yellow rice mixture containing visible carrots, raisins, and meat onto the green banana leaf lining the silver pan. The mound of creamy food settles on the leaf surface as the transfer action completes, filling the center of the pan.

A wooden spatula presses down on a mound of yellow rice mixture containing chicken and raisins, situated on a green banana leaf. The text "Flatten the cooked rice mixture as shown" appears at the bottom as the utensil spreads the food outward to create an even layer within the pan.

A wooden spatula presses down on the yellow rice mixture containing carrots and raisins, spreading it across the green banana leaf lining the pan. The on-screen text instructs to "Flatten the cooked rice mixture as shown" while the utensil smooths the surface of the food.

A hand wearing a clear plastic glove places strips of red bell pepper onto the flattened yellow rice mixture. The on-screen text updates to instruct viewers to top the dish with the rest of the seared green and red bell peppers.

A hand in a clear plastic glove places additional strips of red bell pepper onto the yellow rice mixture. The text "Top with the rest of the seared green and red bell peppers" remains visible at the bottom as the red vegetable pieces are scattered over the flattened dish.

A hand wearing a clear plastic glove places strips of red and green bell peppers onto the flattened yellow rice mixture. The text "Top with the rest of the seared green and red bell peppers" remains at the bottom as the colorful vegetable pieces are scattered over the dish.

White sliced boiled eggs are placed on top of the yellow rice mixture, which is garnished with red and green bell peppers. A hand arranges the egg slices across the surface. The instruction "Add sliced boiled egg" appears at the bottom left.

Hands place a large fresh green banana leaf over the yellow rice mixture topped with sliced eggs and peppers. The leaf covers the food surface. White instructional text visible at the bottom updates to "Place banana leaves on top of the rice" as the covering process begins.

Hands press and smooth a large green banana leaf over the yellow rice mixture, which is topped with sliced eggs and peppers. The leaf completely covers the food surface inside the pan. White instructional text at the bottom reads "Place banana leaves on top of the rice" throughout the action.

A hand lowers a large, shiny silver metal lid onto the pan, completely covering the green banana leaf layer. The text at the bottom left changes to "Cover" as the lid is positioned to seal the cooking vessel, reflecting the surroundings on its polished surface.

The covered silver pan is positioned on a gas stovetop burner. A ring of blue flame is visible beneath the metal cookware, heating the bottom. The white instructional text at the bottom left updates to read "Set pan on low flame" as the scene focuses on the burner.

The view cuts from the blue stove flame to a close-up of the yellow rice dish topped with red and green bell peppers and sliced white eggs. White text at the bottom updates to instruct viewers to "Simmer this for 20 to 30 minutes or until rice is fully cooked" as the dish bubbles gently.

The view shows a shiny silver metal lid covering the cooking pan completely. Reflections of light and surroundings are visible on the curved metallic surface. The "Minang's Kitchen" logo remains in the top left corner. The lid seals the vessel, allowing the contents to simmer as instructed.

The shiny silver metal lid is lifted away from the cooking vessel, exposing a large, glossy green banana leaf underneath. The leaf covers the entire surface of the pan's contents, showing distinct veins and moisture droplets on its textured surface.
Scene continues without notable changes.

The scene cuts to the uncovered yellow rice dish topped with sliced eggs and red and green bell peppers. White text appears at the bottom reading "OPTIONAL: Cook for another 5 to 10 minutes for a toasted bottom. You may also toast the other side". The camera focuses on the textured surface of the food.

A large green banana leaf is placed over the yellow rice dish topped with sliced eggs and peppers, obscuring the food completely. The white text instruction regarding optional toasting remains visible at the bottom of the screen throughout the scene as the leaf covers the pan.

A large green banana leaf is placed over the yellow rice dish, obscuring the sliced eggs and peppers underneath. The white text instruction at the bottom regarding optional toasting remains visible as the leaf fully covers the pan's contents.

The green banana leaf covers the dish while white text instructions appear below. The view cuts to an empty, rectangular wooden cutting board on a counter. The text "OPTIONAL: Cook for another 5 to 10 minutes for a toasted bottom" remains fixed at the bottom of the screen during this transition.

A large, round dish wrapped in a glossy green banana leaf is placed on a wooden cutting board. White text at the bottom reads "OPTIONAL: Cook for another 5 to 10 minutes for a toasted bottom. You may also toast the other side".

summary.text: [0-4] Black screen shifts to dark wood. White text "than Kitc" and yellow "ANG'S" appear with golden sparkles. Graphics tear through wood, forming a food image with "Minang's Kitchen" and yellow "MINANG'S KITCHEN", then fade to black. [4-8] Close-up of yellow rice with peppers/egg shows "Bringhe". Bottom text: "Please like, Share, Subscribe and Hit that Notification bell". Red "SUBSCRIBE" becomes "SUBSCRIBED" via cursor click. Food fades, text remains. [8-12] Raw chicken/rice appear with "INGREDIENTS" list including "350 GRAMS CHICKEN CUTS", "250 GRAMS MALAGKIT RICE". View shifts right to onion/garlic. Cut to white bowl of rice; water pours in. Text: "Soak malagkit rice for" with logo.

[14-18] A blue spatula with a grey handle enters a white bowl containing water and rice, stirring the submerged grains. The instructional text "Soak malagkit rice for 10 to 15 minutes; then drain well" remains fixed at the bottom. The utensil is eventually removed, leaving the rice soaking.
[18-22] The view transitions to a stainless steel gas stovetop. A large silver metal wok is placed onto the front burner. White text updates to "Set wok on medium-low flame" as a ring of blue fire ignites beneath the metal pan.
[22-26] A hand holding a bottle pours a stream of clear cooking oil into the center of the heated silver wok. The liquid spreads across the bottom surface while the text "Add cooking oil" is displayed.
[26-28] Sliced red sausage pieces are added to the hot oil in the silver wok. The text overlay updates to "Pan fry chorizo for 1 to 2 minutes NOTE: Use Chorizo de Bilboa if available." as the meat sits in the pan.

[28-36] A brown wooden spatula enters from the top right, pressing down on glossy red sausage slices frying in hot oil within a silver wok. The utensil pushes the meat pieces around the pan surface. White instructional text reading "Pan fry chorizo for 1 to 2 minutes NOTE: Use Chorizo de Bilboa if available." remains fixed at the bottom.
[36-38] Silver metal tongs replace the spatula, gripping the glistening red sausage slices. The text updates to "Set" as the tongs lift the cooked, browned meat from the oil.
[38-42] The tongs transfer the fried chorizo onto a white ceramic plate held by a hand on the right. The text changes to "Set aside" at the bottom left. The camera focuses on the removed ingredient held above the counter, showing the browned texture of the meat on the plate.

[44-48] Silver metal tongs stir sliced green bell peppers frying in hot oil within a silver wok. The vegetables glisten as moved. White text reads "Sear green bell pepper for 30 seconds; then set aside". Tongs transfer seared green strips to a white ceramic plate.
[48-54] Sliced red bell peppers are added to the hot oil. Text changes to "Do the same for the red bell peppers". Silver tongs stir the frying red strips, scattering them in the pan. The glistening vegetables are moved around the surface before tongs transfer the seared red strips to the white plate.
[54-56] Seared red peppers rest on the plate. A hand pours chopped white garlic from a small metal bowl into the hot oil in the silver wok. Scenes overlap in a transition effect. Oil bubbles as garlic pieces hit the surface.

[56-58] Chopped white garlic pieces sizzle in bubbling hot oil within the silver wok. A brown wooden spatula enters from the top right to stir. White text reads "On the same wok, saute chopped garlic". [58-60] Chopped red onions, characterized by purple and white chunks, are poured into the wok mixing with sautéing garlic and oil. The wooden spatula rests nearby. Text changes to "Chopped red onions". [60-62] The brown wooden spatula stirs chopped red onions and garlic frying in hot oil, blending purple and white chunks with garlic. Text reads "Chopped red onions". [62-64] A hand holds a small metal bowl with bright orange grated material over the silver wok and pours it onto the sautéing onions and garlic. Text updates to "Grated".

[68-70] A wooden spatula mixes the bright orange grated turmeric with the sautéing chopped onions and garlic in the silver wok. The ingredients blend together in the hot oil, coating the aromatics with the vibrant spice color while the text "Grated turmeric" stays visible on screen. [70-72] Raw chicken cuts are added to the silver wok, landing on top of the sautéed turmeric, onion, and garlic mixture. The text overlay changes to read "Add chicken cuts" at the bottom. The pale pink meat contrasts with the vibrant yellow-orange aromatics as it is introduced to the pan. [72-76] A brown wooden spatula stirs the raw chicken pieces, mixing them with the yellow turmeric, onion, and garlic base in the silver wok. The caption changes to 'Saute for 2 to 3 minutes then cover' as the ingredients are combined. The pale meat is turned over to mix with the aromatics, while the instruction 'Saute for 2 to 3 minutes then cover' remains visible at the bottom of the screen during the stirring process. The spatula moves the chicken around the pan to ensure even distribution of the spices and heat.

[66-68] A brown wooden spatula mixes bright orange grated turmeric into sautéing chopped onions and garlic within a silver wok, blending the spice with white and purple onion pieces frying. [76-78] The spatula turns raw chicken pieces, mixing them with the yellow turmeric and onion base. The caption "Saute for 2 to 3 minutes then cover" remains as the pale meat becomes coated. [78-82] A shiny silver metal lid is placed over the wok by a hand, covering the sautéing chicken and yellow spice mixture. The instructional text remains visible as the vessel is sealed. [82-84] The lid is removed, revealing chicken simmering in yellow oil and spices. The meat appears pale and partially cooked. New text reads "Cook for 3 to 5 minutes or until chicken renders its own oil" as the mixture bubbles.

[86-90] White coconut milk is poured from a metal bowl into a silver wok containing a yellow rice and chicken mixture, displaying the text "Add coconut milk". The thick liquid flows over the seasoned grains, pooling around them. A dried brown bay leaf is visible on top as the caption updates to "Bay leaves". [90-94] A brown wooden spatula stirs the mixture inside the silver wok, blending the white coconut milk into the grains. The text "Give it a mix" appears as the ingredients combine into a creamy, cohesive mass.

[94-96] The yellow rice and chicken mixture simmers in the silver wok with creamy liquid bubbling around the grains; the wooden spatula is absent as the dish cooks uncovered in the pan, displaying white text "Simmer for 3 to 5 minutes". [96-98] A shiny silver lid is placed over the wok containing the mixture, and the text updates to "Simmer for 3 to 5 minutes, covered" as the vessel is sealed, showing reflections on the curved metal surface. [98-100] The lid is removed, revealing the cooked yellow rice and chicken with absorbed liquid leaving moist, fluffy grains; a brown wooden spatula stirs the dish, mixing chicken pieces with rice as the text "Stir" appears. [100-102] The spatula stirs the mixture in the silver wok, then a white liquid is poured from a container into the pan flowing over the grains, while the text overlay changes to "Add coconut milk" indicating the ingredient addition.

[64-66] Bright orange grated turmeric is poured from a small metal bowl into the silver wok, landing atop the sautéing onions and garlic. The on-screen text updates to read "Grated turmeric" as the vibrant spice joins the mixture in the hot oil. [84-86] Chicken pieces simmer in yellow oil within the silver wok while the text "Cook for 3 to 5 minutes or until chicken renders its own oil" displays. The meat appears pale and partially cooked as the mixture bubbles gently in the pan. [102-106] White coconut milk is poured from a container into the silver wok, flowing over the yellow rice and chicken mixture. The liquid pools around the ingredients, creating a creamy base. The caption "Add coconut milk" appears at the bottom as the liquid fills the pan. Additionally, sliced carrots are introduced, with the text "Sliced" and "Sliced carrots" visible as they are added to the dish.

In a silver wok containing yellow rice and white coconut milk, dark red slices of pan-fried chorizo are added, displaying the text "Pan fried chorizo" and a "Minang's Kitchen" subscribe banner in the upper right. Green bell pepper strips are placed on top, changing the bottom caption to "Half of the seared green and red bell peppers". Red bell pepper strips are added next, followed by green peas poured from a white bowl, labeled "Add green peas". Finally, dark raisins are poured from a white bowl over the flower-shaped carrots, chorizo, and peas, with the caption "Raisins" displayed in the bottom left as the dried fruit falls into the pan.

[108-110] Sliced orange carrots are poured from a white bowl into a silver wok containing yellow rice, chicken, and white coconut milk, labeled "Sliced carrots" as a like/dislike graphic appears. [118-120] Dark raisins are poured onto the creamy mixture of carrots, chorizo, and green peas, captioned "Raisins", before a white spoon with brown liquid appears as the text updates to "Season with fish sauce". [120-122] The brown liquid is poured over the rice and vegetables. [122-124] White powder is sprinkled from a spoon over the dish, changing the caption to "Chicken powder".

[124-126] White powder labeled "Chicken powder" is sprinkled onto creamy rice with peas, carrots, and raisins in a silver pan. Granular seasoning dusts vegetables and meat. [126-128] Dark ground black pepper is sprinkled from a small white spoon upper right corner, captioned "Ground black pepper" as dark specks land on ingredients. [128-130] Seasoned mixture sits in pan with visible pepper as text updates to "Mix", showing carrots and peas in white coconut milk unstirred. [130-132] Brown wooden spatula enters from upper right to stir yellow rice, chicken, vegetables, and white coconut milk. The text updates to "Mix it well" as utensil folds ingredients together within the pan.

From 132s to 140s, a wooden spatula stirs a mixture of yellow rice, chicken, green peas, orange carrots, and dark raisins in a silver wok. The utensil folds and turns the ingredients to blend in a white liquid. The text "Mix it well" appears at the bottom left. The spatula lifts and tosses the mixture, ensuring the chicken, peas, carrots, and raisins are thoroughly incorporated with the liquid. The caption stays on screen as the stirring continues to blend the ingredients.

[140-146] A wooden spatula continuously stirs, lifts, and folds a creamy yellow rice mixture containing distinct pieces of chicken, green peas, orange carrots, and dark raisins inside a large silver wok. A creamy white liquid integrates further with the solid ingredients as the utensil moves through the pan, ensuring even coating. The instruction text "Mix it well" remains visible at the bottom left corner throughout this extended mixing process. [146-150] A hand enters the frame and sprinkles white salt over the yellow rice mixture. The on-screen text updates to "Add salt" at the bottom left. The creamy dish fills the pan, showing the added white seasoning resting on the surface of the food before any further mixing occurs.

From 150-154s, a wooden spatula stirs and folds a creamy yellow rice mixture containing chicken, peas, carrots, and raisins inside a silver wok. The white instructional text 'Add salt' remains fixed at the bottom left corner throughout this mixing action. At 154-156s, a hand places a large, shiny silver lid over the wok, reflecting light as it fully covers the food, while the text changes to 'Cover and lower the flame to low'. From 156-158s, the camera shows the gas burner beneath the covered wok, where a ring of blue flame is visible burning and heating the cookware. Finally, from 158-160s, the view switches to the simmering yellow rice mixture bubbling gently inside, with text appearing that reads 'Simmer for 5 to 8 minutes or until coconut cream is almost absorbed by the rice'.

[160-162] The yellow rice mixture continues to simmer in a silver wok, with bubbles breaking the surface of the creamy sauce as the liquid level appears slightly reduced; white text at the bottom instructs to "Simmer for 5 to 8 minutes or until coconut cream is almost absorbed by the rice". [162-166] The scene cuts to a silver pan where hands place a large, bright green banana leaf inside to line the bottom, arranging it and pressing it flat against the bottom surface; on-screen text instructs to "Get another pan and cover the bottom of the pan with layers of banana leaves" while the hands smooth the leaf surface. [166-170] A wooden spatula enters the frame holding a large mound of the creamy yellow rice mixture which contains visible pieces of carrots and raisins, transferring a portion onto the green banana leaf inside the silver pan; the white text at the bottom updates to instruct "Transfer the cooked rice mixture in the prepared pan" while the spatula releases the food onto the leaf lining.

[172-176] A wooden spatula presses down on a mound of yellow rice mixture containing chicken, raisins, and carrots, situated on a green banana leaf. The utensil spreads the food outward to create an even layer within the pan, smoothing the surface as the text "Flatten the cooked rice mixture as shown" appears. [176-180] A hand wearing a clear plastic glove places strips of red bell pepper onto the flattened yellow rice mixture. The on-screen text updates to "Top with the rest of the seared green and red bell peppers" as the red vegetable pieces are scattered over the flattened dish.

[180-182] A gloved hand places seared red and green bell pepper strips onto the yellow rice mixture, labeled "Top with the rest of the seared green and red bell peppers". [182-184] Sliced boiled eggs are added on top, captioned "Add sliced boiled egg". [184-188] Hands place and smooth a large green banana leaf over the rice and toppings, with the text "Place banana leaves on top of the rice" displayed throughout the covering process.

[188-190] A hand lowers a large, shiny silver metal lid onto the pan, completely covering the green banana leaf layer, as the text "Cover" appears. [190-192] The covered silver pan is positioned on a gas stovetop burner with a ring of blue flame visible beneath, while the text updates to "Set pan on low flame". [192-194] The view cuts to a close-up of the yellow rice dish topped with red and green bell peppers and sliced white eggs bubbling gently, with instructions to "Simmer this for 20 to 30 minutes or until rice is fully cooked". [194-196] The scene shows the shiny silver metal lid covering the cooking pan completely, sealing the vessel with the "Minang's Kitchen" logo visible.

[196-198] A shiny silver metal lid is lifted away, revealing a large, glossy green banana leaf covering the cooking vessel; the leaf displays distinct veins and moisture droplets. [200-202] The scene cuts to the uncovered yellow rice dish, topped with sliced eggs and red and green bell peppers. White text appears at the bottom: "OPTIONAL: Cook for another 5 to 10 minutes for a toasted bottom. You may also toast the other side". The camera focuses on the food's texture. [202-204] The large green banana leaf is placed back over the yellow rice dish, completely obscuring the food, while the white instructional text remains visible at the bottom of the screen.

Sliced green bell peppers are now frying in the silver wok with hot oil. White text at the bottom reads "Sear green bell pepper for 30 seconds; then set aside". Silver metal tongs enter the frame to stir the bright green vegetable strips in the pan.

Chopped white garlic pieces sizzle in bubbling hot oil within the silver wok. A brown wooden spatula enters from the top right to stir the garlic. White text at the bottom reads "On the same wok, saute chopped garlic" as the ingredients are mixed together in the center of the pan.

Chopped red onions, characterized by purple and white chunks, are poured into the silver wok mixing with the sautéing garlic and oil. The wooden spatula rests nearby. The on-screen text changes to "Chopped red onions" to label the ingredient being added to the pan.

A brown wooden spatula stirs the mixture of chopped red onions and garlic frying in hot oil within the silver wok. The purple and white onion chunks are blended with the garlic pieces. White text at the bottom reads "Chopped red onions" as the ingredients sauté together in the pan.

A hand holds a small metal bowl containing bright orange grated material over the silver wok. The orange substance is poured into the pan, landing on top of the sautéing onions and garlic. The white text overlay at the bottom updates to read "Grated" as the ingredient is added to the mixture.

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] Black screen shifts to dark wood. White text "than Kitc" and yellow "ANG'S" appear with golden sparkles. Graphics tear through wood, forming a food image with "Minang's Kitchen" and yellow "MINANG'S KITCHEN", then fade to black. [4-8] Close-up of yellow rice with peppers/egg shows "Bringhe". Bottom text: "Please like, Share, Subscribe and Hit that Notification bell". Red "SUBSCRIBE" becomes "SUBSCRIBED" via cursor click. Food fades, text remains. [8-12] Raw chicken/rice appear with "INGREDIENTS" list including "350 GRAMS CHICKEN CUTS", "250 GRAMS MALAGKIT RICE". View shifts right to onion/garlic. Cut to white bowl of rice; water pours in. Text: "Soak malagkit rice for" with logo.

[14-18] A blue spatula with a grey handle enters a white bowl containing water and rice, stirring the submerged grains. The instructional text "Soak malagkit rice for 10 to 15 minutes; then drain well" remains fixed at the bottom. The utensil is eventually removed, leaving the rice soaking.
[18-22] The view transitions to a stainless steel gas stovetop. A large silver metal wok is placed onto the front burner. White text updates to "Set wok on medium-low flame" as a ring of blue fire ignites beneath the metal pan.
[22-26] A hand holding a bottle pours a stream of clear cooking oil into the center of the heated silver wok. The liquid spreads across the bottom surface while the text "Add cooking oil" is displayed.
[26-28] Sliced red sausage pieces are added to the hot oil in the silver wok. The text overlay updates to "Pan fry chorizo for 1 to 2 minutes NOTE: Use Chorizo de Bilboa if available." as the meat sits in the pan.

[28-36] A brown wooden spatula enters from the top right, pressing down on glossy red sausage slices frying in hot oil within a silver wok. The utensil pushes the meat pieces around the pan surface. White instructional text reading "Pan fry chorizo for 1 to 2 minutes NOTE: Use Chorizo de Bilboa if available." remains fixed at the bottom.
[36-38] Silver metal tongs replace the spatula, gripping the glistening red sausage slices. The text updates to "Set" as the tongs lift the cooked, browned meat from the oil.
[38-42] The tongs transfer the fried chorizo onto a white ceramic plate held by a hand on the right. The text changes to "Set aside" at the bottom left. The camera focuses on the removed ingredient held above the counter, showing the browned texture of the meat on the plate.

[44-48] Silver metal tongs stir sliced green bell peppers frying in hot oil within a silver wok. The vegetables glisten as moved. White text reads "Sear green bell pepper for 30 seconds; then set aside". Tongs transfer seared green strips to a white ceramic plate.
[48-54] Sliced red bell peppers are added to the hot oil. Text changes to "Do the same for the red bell peppers". Silver tongs stir the frying red strips, scattering them in the pan. The glistening vegetables are moved around the surface before tongs transfer the seared red strips to the white plate.
[54-56] Seared red peppers rest on the plate. A hand pours chopped white garlic from a small metal bowl into the hot oil in the silver wok. Scenes overlap in a transition effect. Oil bubbles as garlic pieces hit the surface.

Bottom text: "Please like, Share, Subscribe and Hit that Notification bell". Red "SUBSCRIBE" becomes "SUBSCRIBED" via cursor click. Food fades, text remains. [8-12] Raw chicken/rice appear with "INGREDIENTS" list including "350 GRAMS CHICKEN CUTS", "250 GRAMS MALAGKIT RICE". View shifts right to onion/garlic. Cut to white bowl of rice; water pours in. Text: "Soak malagkit rice for" with logo. [14-18] A blue spatula with a grey handle enters a white bowl containing water and rice, stirring the submerged grains. The instructional text "Soak malagkit rice for 10 to 15 minutes; then drain well" remains fixed at the bottom. The utensil is eventually removed, leaving the rice soaking. [18-22] The view transitions to a stainless steel gas stovetop. A large silver metal wok is placed onto the front burner. White text updates to "Set wok on medium-low flame" as a ring of blue fire ignites beneath the metal pan. [22-26] A hand holding a bottle

[140-146] A wooden spatula continuously stirs, lifts, and folds a creamy yellow rice mixture containing distinct pieces of chicken, green peas, orange carrots, and dark raisins inside a large silver wok. A creamy white liquid integrates further with the solid ingredients as the utensil moves through the pan, ensuring even coating. The instruction text "Mix it well" remains visible at the bottom left corner throughout this extended mixing process. [146-150] A hand enters the frame and sprinkles white salt over the yellow rice mixture. The on-screen text updates to "Add salt" at the bottom left. The creamy dish fills the pan, showing the added white seasoning resting on the surface of the food before any further mixing occurs.

From 150-154s, a wooden spatula stirs and folds a creamy yellow rice mixture containing chicken, peas, carrots, and raisins inside a silver wok. The white instructional text 'Add salt' remains fixed at the bottom left corner throughout this mixing action. At 154-156s, a hand places a large, shiny silver lid over the wok, reflecting light as it fully covers the food, while the text changes to 'Cover and lower the flame to low'. From 156-158s, the camera shows the gas burner beneath the covered wok, where a ring of blue flame is visible burning and heating the cookware. Finally, from 158-160s, the view switches to the simmering yellow rice mixture bubbling gently inside, with text appearing that reads 'Simmer for 5 to 8 minutes or until coconut cream is almost absorbed by the rice'.

[160-162] The yellow rice mixture continues to simmer in a silver wok, with bubbles breaking the surface of the creamy sauce as the liquid level appears slightly reduced; white text at the bottom instructs to "Simmer for 5 to 8 minutes or until coconut cream is almost absorbed by the rice". [162-166] The scene cuts to a silver pan where hands place a large, bright green banana leaf inside to line the bottom, arranging it and pressing it flat against the bottom surface; on-screen text instructs to "Get another pan and cover the bottom of the pan with layers of banana leaves" while the hands smooth the leaf surface. [166-170] A wooden spatula enters the frame holding a large mound of the creamy yellow rice mixture which contains visible pieces of carrots and raisins, transferring a portion onto the green banana leaf inside the silver pan; the white text at the bottom updates to instruct "Transfer the cooked rice mixture in the prepared pan" while the spatula releases the food onto the leaf lining.

[172-176] A wooden spatula presses down on a mound of yellow rice mixture containing chicken, raisins, and carrots, situated on a green banana leaf. The utensil spreads the food outward to create an even layer within the pan, smoothing the surface as the text "Flatten the cooked rice mixture as shown" appears. [176-180] A hand wearing a clear plastic glove places strips of red bell pepper onto the flattened yellow rice mixture. The on-screen text updates to "Top with the rest of the seared green and red bell peppers" as the red vegetable pieces are scattered over the flattened dish.

recent_thinks.text: Water pours into a white bowl filled with uncooked rice grains on a wooden table. The liquid level rises, submerging the grains completely. Bottom text updates to instructions: "Soak malagkit rice for 10 to 15 minutes; then drain well". Bubbles appear on the water surface as the bowl fills.

Sliced green bell peppers are now frying in the silver wok with hot oil. White text at the bottom reads "Sear green bell pepper for 30 seconds; then set aside". Silver metal tongs enter the frame to stir the bright green vegetable strips in the pan.

White coconut milk pools around the yellow rice and chicken mixture in the silver wok. A white bowl containing bright orange sliced carrots is held over the pan, ready to be added. The text "Sliced" appears in the bottom left corner as the vegetables are introduced.

A wooden spatula deposits a large portion of yellow rice mixture containing visible carrots, raisins, and meat onto the green banana leaf lining the silver pan. The mound of creamy food settles on the leaf surface as the transfer action completes, filling the center of the pan.

A hand wearing a clear plastic glove places strips of red and green bell peppers onto the flattened yellow rice mixture. The text "Top with the rest of the seared green and red bell peppers" remains at the bottom as the colorful vegetable pieces are scattered over the dish.

White sliced boiled eggs are placed on top of the yellow rice mixture, which is garnished with red and green bell peppers. A hand arranges the egg slices across the surface. The instruction "Add sliced boiled egg" appears at the bottom left.

Hands place a large fresh green banana leaf over the yellow rice mixture topped with sliced eggs and peppers. The leaf covers the food surface. White instructional text visible at the bottom updates to "Place banana leaves on top of the rice" as the covering process begins.

Hands press and smooth a large green banana leaf over the yellow rice mixture, which is topped with sliced eggs and peppers. The leaf completely covers the food surface inside the pan. White instructional text at the bottom reads "Place banana leaves on top of the rice" throughout the action.
